title: botrychium biternatum
intro: Botrychium biternatum, also known as rattlesnake fern, is a type of terrestrial fern that belongs to the Ophioglossaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The health benefits of rattlesnake fern include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Botrychium biternatum typically involve drying and processing the plant's rhizomes and leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and poultices for topical application.
